mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_process_activity_form ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_process_activity_form (title, description, division_name, department_name, evaluator, creation_date, team_members, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{divisionName}, #{departmentName}, #{evaluator}, #{creationDate}, #{teamMembers}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_process_activity_form SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, division_name = #{divisionName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, evaluator = #{evaluator}, creation_date = #{creationDate}, team_members = #{teamMembers}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_process_activity_process WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_process_activity_process (form_id, major_category, middle_category, sub_category, sort_order, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{formId}, #{majorCategory}, #{middleCategory}, #{subCategory}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_process_activity_item WHERE process_id IN #{pid} ORDER BY process_id, sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_process_activity_item (process_id, item_no, work_content, exclude_eval, applicable_law, sort_order, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{processId}, #{itemNo}, #{workContent}, #{excludeEval}, #{applicableLaw}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_process_activity_item WHERE process_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_process_activity_process WHERE form_id = #{formId})
